div1.entryFree: Tattered (sometimes tottered) torn; ragged: thy youth's proud livery . . . will be a t. weed, Sonn. 2, 4. puts apparel on my t. loving, 26, 11. from this castle's t. battlements, R2 III, 3, 52 (Q1. 2 tottered). a hundred and fifty t. prodigals, H4A IV, 2, 37 (Qq and earlier Ff tottered). in t. weeds, Rom. V, 1, 39. through t. clothes small vices do appear, Lr. IV, 6, 168.
